title: Webserver: SSRF via connection test endpoint
body:
### The issue description

SSRF via the connection test UI — an authenticated user can trigger outbound HTTP to internal addresses.

### Reporter credited as

Alice Example <alice@pentest.example>

### Severity

Unknown

### Affected versions

>= 2.9.0, < 2.10.3

labels: airflow, cve allocated
state: OPEN
